narratives.Overview: Implement the markdownlint compatibility layer in packages/compat-markdownlint. Maps markdownlint rule identifiers (e.g. MD013) to equivalent unified-lint-rule shims. Detects and loads .markdownlintrc or .markdownlint.json from the project root and translates the config into MarkyConfig format. Covers FR-5.

items.title: loadMarkdownlintConfig(cwd: string): Promise<Partial<MarkyConfig>> reads .markdownlintrc / .markdownlint.json and translates enabled rules to marky plugin/severity entries
MD013 (line-length) rule implemented as a unified-lint-rule shim with configurable line-length option
MD041 (first-line-heading) rule implemented as a unified-lint-rule shim
Rule mapping table documented in packages/compat-markdownlint/README.md listing supported vs unsupported markdownlint rules
When .markdownlintrc is absent, loadMarkdownlintConfig returns an empty config without error
Unit tests cover: .markdownlintrc loaded and translated, MD013 fires on a long line, MD041 fires when first line is not a heading, absent config returns empty
task check passes at >= 85% coverage for packages/compat-markdownlint
